policies.name: UP Industrial Investment & Employment Promotion Policy 2022 (IIEPP)
policies.incentive_type: Capital subsidy (one of 3 mutually exclusive options) + stamp duty exemption + boosters
policies.what_companies_get: Base capital subsidy 10-30% of Eligible Capital Investment paid over 10-20 years, graded by region and project size: Large (>Rs50cr-<200cr) 10-15% over 10y; Mega (Rs200-500cr) 18-22% over 12y; Super Mega (Rs500-3000cr) 20-25% over 15y; Ultra-Mega (>Rs3000cr) 22-30% over 20y. Highest rates in Bundelkhand/Poorvanchal. Annual ceilings Rs5cr/10cr/50cr/150cr (Rs15/75/210cr with boosters). Subsidy scaled by Gross Capacity Utilisation Multiple (75% peak utilisation = full). Employment/Exports/Ecosystem boosters +2-3% each (min employment 300/600/1500 for Mega/Super/Ultra). Stamp duty exemption: 100% Bundelkhand & Poorvanchal, 75% Madhyanchal & Paschimanchal, 50% Gautam Buddh Nagar & Ghaziabad.
policies.application_status: Applications via Nivesh Sarathi / Nivesh Mitra single-window (both portals live); one-time option choice at application, one change allowed before HLEC/EC approval
policies.site_notes: Full incentive tables rendered on page; verified 2026-07-20. Site last-updated stamp July 15, 2026.

policies.name: UP Electronics Component Manufacturing Policy 2025 (First Amendment)
policies.incentive_type: State top-up on central ECMS + capital subsidy + land/stamp/electricity concessions
policies.what_companies_get: Top-up benefits EQUAL to Central ECMS incentives (doubling the central payout); capital subsidy up to 20% for units NOT covered under Central ECMS; customized mega packages for investments above Rs2,000cr; additional +2% for Li-ion cell mfg (digital applications) with local sourcing and +1% for multi-layer PCB with local laminates; 25% land subsidy (up to 50% in Bundelkhand & Purvanchal); 100% stamp duty and electricity duty exemption; interest subsidy, EPF reimbursement, patent cost reimbursement, logistics & R&D support. Focus segments: display/camera module sub-assemblies, bare components (non-SMD passives, multi-layer/HDI/MSAP/flex PCB, Li-ion cells, enclosures), capital equipment.
policies.status: Active (First Amendment; English policy document updated on site 20 May 2026)
policies.application_status: Policy document downloadable; applications via UP single-window ecosystem
policies.site_notes: This is the state top-up policy on central ECMS the brief asked to verify — confirmed verbatim on the page ('Top-up Benefits: Equal to Central ECMS incentives').

policies.name: Haryana Enterprises & Employment Policy (HEEP) 2020
policies.incentive_type: SGST-linked investment subsidy + block-graded capital/interest/duty concessions
policies.what_companies_get: Investment subsidy on SGST (reimbursement of net SGST paid, block-graded, capped as % of Fixed Capital Investment); interest subsidy 5% on term loan for micro/small units (max Rs20 lakh/yr; 5 years in C & D blocks, 3 years in B blocks); stamp duty refund; electricity duty exemption; power tariff subsidy; EPF/ESI reimbursement; employment generation subsidy; plus ~20 named MSME schemes (Technology Acquisition, Patent Registration, Quality Certification, Freight Assistance, Generator Set Subsidy, R&D Center, SME Exchange Equity, Mini Cluster Development, etc.). Incentives graded by A/B/C/D block categorization (D = most backward, max benefits).
policies.status: Active as amended ('Amended HEEP-2020, CAQM' listed); a 2025 successor policy was NOT found on the pages fetched
policies.application_status: Applications via investharyana.in single-window (portal live; login-gated) and HUM/Udyam registration
policies.site_notes: Full HEEP scheme list verified on Directorate of MSME Haryana page 2026-07-20; SGST/interest-subsidy specifics from search snippets of the official policy PDF (investharyana.in/content/pdfs/Draft EPP 2020 chapters). investharyana.in itself is a JS shell — see access issues.

policies.name: Industrial and Business Development Policy 2026 (IBDP 2026)

The gazette PDF on investpunjab.gov.in is a 21.8MB scanned document; incentive tables are not machine-readable, so percentages (SGST reimbursement, electricity-duty and stamp-duty exemptions traditionally in the IBDP series) could not be extracted this pass.
policies.application_status: Invest Punjab single-window portal is live (Angular app); application status unverifiable without login
policies.site_notes: PDF downloaded and confirmed as the official gazette notification (No. PIU/Industrial & Business Development Policy-2026/898). Only the 2017 and 2026 policy PDFs are discoverable on the domain — no 2022 document found.

policies.name: Uttarakhand Mega Industrial and Investment Policy 2025 (MIIP 2025) + Implementing Guideline
policies.incentive_type: Capital subsidy / CAPEX subsidy for large investments, hill-area weighted
policies.what_companies_get: MIIP-2025 and its Implementing Guideline are both listed with English+Hindi PDFs on the official Policies page (successor to MIIP 2021, which is also still listed). The live 'Know Your Incentive' calculator computes eligibility by district, plain vs hilly land, MSME/MIIP category and entrepreneur category across incentive heads including CAPEX Subsidy, Capital Subsidy, Anchor Unit Subsidy, Electricity Bill/Duty Reimbursement, Custom Duty Reimbursement, Stamp-duty-type exemptions, EPI Subsidy, Export Assistance, DPR Assistance. Exact percentages sit in unlabeled PDFs (see access issues) and were not extracted.
policies.status: Active (2025 policy + guideline listed; 2021 MIIP also still listed)
policies.application_status: Live single-window with Incentive Dashboard, 'Mega Incentive Login' and incentive calculator — applications clearly operational
policies.site_notes: Policy names verified in rendered page text 2026-07-20.
